description:
Recto: draft of a suretyship agreement in the hand of Efrayim b. Shemarya (fl. 1007–1055 CE). Khallūf b. Yehuda undertakes to act as surety for Yosef b. Yaʿaqov; possibly also draft of another contract; with marginalia.

Verso: Accounts in Arabic script. Mentions Salāma b. ʿAllūn; Ibn al-Kohen; ʿAllūn al-Ḥaver; Maymūn; Hiba Ṣayrafī (Ṣūfī?); Hilāl; Abū Saʿd; [...] b. Sahl; Yūsuf; Abū l-Maʿālī; Khalīl(?); Abū Yūsuf b. Sahlān; Mubārak Ṣayrafī; Ibn Ṣhaṭranjī.

Resembles ENA 3616.14 (PGPID 29758) but probably not a join.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
